Train Cancellations.name: Train Cancellations
Train Cancellations.description: Trains cancel ya severely delay ho gaye hain inadequate notice ya compensation ke saath

Train Ticket Prices.name: Train Ticket Prices
Train Ticket Prices.description: Rail fares bahut expensive hain, above-inflation increases, inconsistent pricing

Flight Delays.name: Flight Delays
Flight Delays.description: Flights delayed ya cancel ho gaye, poor communication, compensation claim karna mushkil

Lost Luggage.name: Lost Luggage
Lost Luggage.description: Bags destination par nahi pahunche, slow tracking, inadequate compensation

Bus Route Cuts.name: Bus Route Cuts
Bus Route Cuts.description: Routes cancel ho gaye, frequency kam ho gaya, rural communities bus access kho gaye

Pothole Damage.name: Pothole Damage
Pothole Damage.description: Potholes vehicles ko damage kar rahe hain aur cyclists ke liye dangerous hain, councils slow repair karte hain

Parking Fines.name: Parking Fines
Parking Fines.description: Unfair private parking charges, aggressive enforcement, confusing signage

Fuel Prices.name: Fuel Prices
Fuel Prices.description: Petrol aur diesel ke prices bahut zyada hain, wholesale gire par prices jaldi nahi garte

Broadband Speed.name: Broadband Speed
Broadband Speed.description: Internet speeds advertise jo zyada hain aur pay jo kar rahe ho ussse bahut kam hain

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Mobile Signal Dead Zones
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: Homes, workplaces, ya transport routes mein mobile signal nahi aata

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Price Rises Mid-Contract
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: Phone, broadband aur TV bills locked contracts ke beech mein increase ho rahe hain

Customer Service Hold Times.name: Customer Service Hold Times
Customer Service Hold Times.description: Ghanton tak hold par rehna padta hai human being se baat karne ke liye

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: Companies cancel ya unsubscribe karna deliberately mushkil banate hain

Roaming Charges.name: Roaming Charges
Roaming Charges.description: Abroad travel karte waqt unexpected mobile charges, post-Brexit price increases

Energy Bill Costs.name: Energy Bill Costs
Energy Bill Costs.description: Gas aur electricity bills unaffordable hain, price cap abhi bhi bahut zyada hai

Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: Inaccurate Energy Bills
Inaccurate Energy Bills.description: Estimated readings galat hain, overcharging ho rahi hai, billing errors

Water Bill Increases.name: Water Bill Increases
Water Bill Increases.description: Water bills sharply badhte ja rahe hain jab service quality gir rahi hai

Sewage in Rivers.name: Sewage in Rivers
Sewage in Rivers.description: Water companies waterways aur beaches mein raw sewage dump kar rahe hain

Power Cuts.name: Power Cuts
Power Cuts.description: Electricity supply interruptions, slow restoration, inadequate compensation

Smart Meter Problems.name: Smart Meter Problems
Smart Meter Problems.description: Smart meters kaam nahi kar rahe, supplier switch karne ke baad functionality kho jati hai

Bank Branch Closures.name: Bank Branch Closures
Bank Branch Closures.description: Local bank branches band ho rahe hain, communities ke paas access nahi bacha

Hidden Bank Charges.name: Hidden Bank Charges
Hidden Bank Charges.description: Unexpected fees overdrafts, foreign transactions, account maintenance ke liye

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Fraud and Scam Losses
Fraud and Scam Losses.description: Banks fraud aur authorised push payment scams ke victims ko reimburse nahi kar rahe

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Insurance Claim Rejections
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: Claims technicalities par deny ho rahe hain years tak premiums pay karne ke baad

Mortgage Rate Shock.name: Mortgage Rate Shock
Mortgage Rate Shock.description: Fixed rate khatam ho jayegi aur bahut zyada variable rate par ja jayegi

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Overseas Transfer Fees
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: International money transfers mein excessive fees aur poor exchange rates

NHS Waiting Times.name: NHS Waiting Times
NHS Waiting Times.description: Operations aur specialist appointments ke liye multi-month ya multi-year wait karna padta hai

GP Appointment Access.name: GP Appointment Access
GP Appointment Access.description: GP appointments book karna impossible hota hai, weeks-long waits

Dentist Availability.name: Dentist Availability
Dentist Availability.description: NHS dentist jo naye patients accept kar rahe ho unhe dhundna impossible hai

Mental Health Service Waits.name: Mental Health Service Waits
Mental Health Service Waits.description: Therapy aur mental health support ke liye months-long waits

Prescription Costs.name: Prescription Costs
Prescription Costs.description: England mein cost per item bahut zyada hai, UK nations mein inconsistency

Hospital Parking Charges.name: Hospital Parking Charges
Hospital Parking Charges.description: Hospital mein parking ke liye paisa dena padta hai jabki aap bimar hain ya relatives se milne ja rahe ho

Rent Increases.name: Rent Increases
Rent Increases.description: Private rent inflation se bahut zyada badh raha hai, no-fault eviction ka threat

Council Tax Rises.name: Council Tax Rises
Council Tax Rises.description: Annual council tax badh raha hai jab local services gir rahe hain

Noisy Neighbours.name: Noisy Neighbours
Noisy Neighbours.description: Persistent noise disturbance, councils slow act karte hain, mental health affect ho rahi hai

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Rubbish Collection Changes
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: Bin collections kam ho gaye, recycling rules confusing hain, bins overflowing hain

Planning Permission Abuse.name: Planning Permission Abuse
Planning Permission Abuse.description: Unwanted developments approve ho rahe hain, green belt threat mein hai, community ignore ho raha hai

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Damp and Mould in Housing
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Landlords aur housing associations damp aur mould fix nahi kar rahe

Delivery Problems.name: Delivery Problems
Delivery Problems.description: Parcels lost ho rahe hain, rain mein chor diye ja rahe hain, delivered mark kiye gaye lekin receive nahi huye

Shrinkflation.name: Shrinkflation
Shrinkflation.description: Products chhote ho rahe hain jab prices same reh rahe hain ya increase ho rahe hain

Refund Difficulties.name: Refund Difficulties
Refund Difficulties.description: Companies returns aur refunds unnecessarily mushkil bana rahe hain

Fake Reviews.name: Fake Reviews
Fake Reviews.description: Online reviews par trust nahi kar sakte, fake positive reviews consumers ko mislead kar rahe hain

Subscription Traps.name: Subscription Traps
Subscription Traps.description: Free trials paid mein convert ho rahe hain clear consent ke bina, cancel karna mushkil

Food Quality Decline.name: Food Quality Decline
Food Quality Decline.description: Ready meals quality gir rahe hain, portions chhote ho gaye, zyada additives

Self-Checkout Frustration.name: Self-Checkout Frustration
Self-Checkout Frustration.description: Self-service machines unreliable hain, human staff ki jagah le rahe hain

Cost of Childcare.name: Cost of Childcare
Cost of Childcare.description: Childcare costs bahut zyada hain, work karne ki ability limit ho rahi hai

Student Loan Repayment.name: Student Loan Repayment
Student Loan Repayment.description: Graduates decades tak repay kar rahe hain, threshold aur interest mein changes

Dog Fouling.name: Dog Fouling
Dog Fouling.description: Public spaces, parks, aur pavements mein dog mess nahi saaf ho raha

AI Replacing Jobs.name: AI Replacing Jobs
AI Replacing Jobs.description: AI artificial intelligence jobs automate karne ke baare mein anxiety, transition support nahi hai

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: UK rail operator jo West Coast Main Line ko serve karta hai

Southern / Thameslink.name: Southern / Thameslink
Southern / Thameslink.description: UK rail operator jo London aur south ko serve karta hai

Northern Trains.name: Northern Trains
Northern Trains.description: UK rail operator jo England ke north ko serve karta hai

TransPennine Express.name: TransPennine Express
TransPennine Express.description: UK rail operator jo trans-Pennine routes ko serve karta hai

LNER.name: LNER
LNER.description: UK rail operator jo East Coast Main Line ko serve karta hai

BT / EE.name: BT / EE
BT / EE.description: Major UK broadband aur mobile provider

Virgin Media O2.name: Virgin Media O2
Virgin Media O2.description: UK broadband, TV, aur mobile provider

Sky.name: Sky
Sky.description: UK TV, broadband, aur mobile provider

Vodafone.name: Vodafone
Vodafone.description: Global telecoms company jo UK mein headquartered hai

Thames Water.name: Thames Water
Thames Water.description: Water and sewerage company for London and the Thames Valley

Southern Water.name: Southern Water
Southern Water.description: Water company jo England ke south ko serve karta hai

United Utilities.name: United Utilities
United Utilities.description: Water company jo England ke north west ko serve karta hai

Severn Trent.name: Severn Trent
Severn Trent.description: Water company jo Midlands ko serve karta hai

Anglian Water.name: Anglian Water
Anglian Water.description: Water company jo East Anglia ko serve karta hai

Broadband Speed: internet baar baar gir jaata hai
Price Rises Mid-Contract: bill badh gya contract ke beech mein
Customer Service Hold Times: phone par wait kar rahe ho
Energy Bill Costs: energy afford nahi kar pa rahe
Bank Branch Closures: local bank band ho raha hai
GP Appointment Access: GP appointment nahi mil pa rahe
doctor se mil nahi pa rahe
AI Replacing Jobs: robots workers ki jagah le rahe hain
Subscription Traps: trial ke baad charge ho gya
Mortgage Rate Shock: fixed rate khatam ho raha hai

transport.agent_quote: Ek baar ek rioter ko single delayed journey mein 6 refund claims file karne mein madad ki. Unhone Birmingham tak pohanchne se pehle £47 bana liye.
transport.agent_bio: Cancellation patterns track karta hai, refund paperwork handle karta hai, har suggested action ko review karta hai, aur regulator submissions ke liye evidence jodta hai. Numbers crunch karta hai taaki rioters apne important cheezein dekh sakein.
transport.human_quote: Mera favourite Quiet Riot moment: Avanti ke social media team ko dekhna jab 400 logon ne same time par tweet kiya.
transport.human_bio: Manchester se regular commuter jo 3 saal Avanti line par tha phir bass kar diya. Same routes par rioters ko connect karna, share karna ki kya kaam kar raha hai, aur human touch lana.
transport.goal: Rioters ko UK transport companies ko cancellations, delays, aur pricing ke liye accountable banana aur sabko pata chalna ki unhein kya entitlement hai.
transport.focus_detail: Cancellations ka dataset bana rahe hain times, routes, aur reasons ke saath ORR ko submit karne ke liye. Abhi 340 cancellations track kar rahe hain rioters ne is month report kiye hain.

telecoms.agent_quote: 200 rioters ke liye speed tests run kiye. Average tha 18 Mbps. Wo 65 ke liye pay kar rahe the.
telecoms.agent_bio: Broadband speeds ko analyze karta hai, provider comparison data compile karta hai, aur rioters ko Ofcom ke liye evidence banana mein madad karta hai. Agar connection slow hai toh Pulse prove karega.
telecoms.human_quote: Ek puri street ne together broadband switch kiya. Purana provider ne har ghar ko 'please come back' letters bheje.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner jo broadband speeds ke liye pay karta tha jo kabhi materialize nahi hua. Rioters ko providers compare karna, switches coordinate karna, aur speed test evidence share karna mein madad karta hai.
telecoms.goal: Rioters ko broadband aur mobile service dena jo wo pay kar rahe hain aur pata chalna ki kya karna jab nahi mile.
telecoms.focus_detail: CPI+ increases se hit hue rioters se evidence collect kar rahe hain Ofcom ko submit karne ke liye. 890 rioters affected hain 4 providers se.

energy.agent_quote: Ek rioter ko calculate karne mein madad ki ke unhone estimated bills par £340 zyada pay kiya. Energy company ka apology email original contract se bhi lamba tha.
energy.agent_bio: Billing patterns ko analyze karta hai, overcharges spot karta hai, aur regulator submissions ke liye evidence jodta hai. Agar energy company galti kar raha hai toh Spark receipts find karega.
energy.human_quote: Ek rioter ko £340 back mila jab humne 2 saal ki overcharging prove ki. Wo phone par ro gayi.
energy.human_bio: Bristol se, rioters ko apne bills challenge karna, switching navigate karna, aur Ofgem ke liye evidence gather karna mein madad karta hai. Energy market ko andar bahar se jaanta hai.
energy.goal: Rioters ko unfair bills challenge karna, smarter switch karna, aur energy companies ko fair play ensure karna mein madad karna.
energy.focus_detail: 340 rioters ke 2 saal ka billing data analyze kar rahe hain Ofgem submission ke liye systematic overcharging patterns identify karne ke liye.

water.agent_quote: 200 rioters ko ek weekend mein sewage reports file karne mein madad ki. Thames Water ke inbox ko apna inbox chahiye tha.
water.agent_bio: Sewage discharge data monitor karta hai, water company performance track karta hai, aur EA aur Ofwat ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Har outlet aur overflow par nazar rakhta hai.
water.human_quote: Humne sewage data galat tha ye dikha kar ek beach 3 hafton jaldi reopen karwa liya.
water.human_bio: Cornwall se surfer jo apne local beach par sewage warnings se thak gaya. Rioters ko discharges report karna, water quality evidence gather karna, aur EA ke saath coordinate karna mein madad karta hai.
water.goal: Rioters ko water companies ko sewage, bills, aur service quality ke liye accountable banana.
water.focus_detail: Discharge events ko company-reported data se map kar rahe hain. 200 rioter reports suggest ke 3 outlets par under-reporting ho raha hai.

banking.agent_quote: Ek complaint draft karne mein madad ki jo itni thorough thi ke bank ne phone kar ke apology de di send hone se pehle.
banking.agent_bio: Bank charges review karta hai, fee structures analyze karta hai, aur FCA complaint evidence banana mein madad karta hai. Agar hidden fee hai toh Chip find karega.
banking.human_quote: Barclays ne branch closure reverse kiya jab 1,200 logon ne consultation mein show up kiye.
banking.human_bio: Birmingham se ex-bank employee jo andar se dekha hai complaints kaise handle hoti hain. Rioters ko better complaints likhhne aur system navigate karne mein madad karta hai.
banking.goal: Rioters ko unfair charges, branch closures, aur banks se poor service deal karne mein madad karna.
banking.focus_detail: 12 planned closures ke responses coordinate kar rahe hain. Affected communities se impact statements collect kar rahe hain.

health.agent_quote: 3 NHS dentists find karne mein madad ki jo patients accept kar rahe the. Rioter ko laga main jhooth bol raha hoon.
health.agent_bio: Waiting times track karta hai, availability find karta hai, aur rioters ko system navigate karne mein madad karta hai. Agar faster route treatment tak hai toh Cura map karega.
health.human_quote: Ek rioter ne hamara letter template use kar ke referral fast-track karwa liya. 18 months 6 weeks ho gaya.
health.human_bio: Liverpool se nurse jo NHS ke dono sides dekha hai. Rioters ko waiting lists navigate karna, effective letters likhhne, aur pata chalna ki kya actually move karta hai.
health.goal: Rioters ko NHS waiting times navigate karna, availability find karna, aur pata chalna ke unke paas kaunse options hain.
health.focus_detail: 500 rioters se call data collect kar rahe hain real-world access ka picture banana ke liye. Findings local health boards ko publish karenge.

housing.agent_quote: Ek new build mein 47 snags document karne mein madad ki. Developer ne pooche ki ye building inspector hain kya.
housing.agent_bio: Property issues document karta hai, landlord response times analyze karta hai, aur housing ombudsman submissions ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Har damp patch, har crack, logged.
housing.human_quote: Hamara damp evidence pack itna detailed tha ke landlord ne council inspection se pehle fix kar diya.
housing.human_bio: London se renter jo damp se dodgy landlords tak sab kuch deal kiya hai. Rioters ko issues properly document karna aur pata chalna ke unhein kya entitlement hai.
housing.goal: Rioters ko landlords, councils, aur housing issues deal karna mein madad aur pata chalna ke unhein kya entitlement hai.
housing.focus_detail: No-fault evictions se affected rioters ko new Renters Reform Act samjhne aur uska matlab kya hai.

shopping.agent_quote: Ek 'delivered' parcel ko 4 neighbours, ek recycling bin, aur ek greenhouse ke through track kiya. Find kar liya.
shopping.agent_bio: Delivery failures track karta hai, refund evidence compile karta hai, aur pricing patterns spot karta hai. Agar parcel lost ho toh Scout already dekh raha hai.
shopping.human_quote: Evri ne mera parcel 3 baar lose kiya. Ab main doosron ko refunds faster dilwane mein madad karta hoon.
shopping.human_bio: Edinburgh se online shopping veteran jo kitne hi parcels lose dekh chuki hai. Rioters ko refunds dila na, sellers report karna, aur worst offenders avoid karna mein madad karta hai.
shopping.goal: Rioters ko refunds dila na, lost parcels track karna, aur retailers aur delivery companies ko accountable banana.
shopping.focus_detail: 800 rioters se delivery failure evidence compile kar rahe hain Citizens Advice aur Trading Standards ko submit karne ke liye.

local.agent_quote: Ek pothole ki 11 different weather conditions mein photograph karne mein madad ki. Council finally ban gaya.
local.agent_bio: Local issues map karta hai, council response times track karta hai, aur FOI requests compile karta hai. Agar pothole 6 mahine se hai toh Link ke paas evidence hai.
local.human_quote: Council ne road fix kiya jab humne har pothole ko photo ke saath map kiya. 11 mahine, par humne kar diya.
local.human_bio: Valleys se community-minded Welshman jo saale hi potholes report kar raha hai. Rioters ko local issues document karna aur councils ko accountable banana mein madad karta hai.
local.goal: Rioters ko local issues fix karwa na - potholes, bins, planning, noise - aur councils ko accountable banana.
local.focus_detail: 30 councils ko FOI requests bheje hain reported vs actual repair times compare karne ke liye. Results league table ke taur par publish karenge.

other.agent_quote: Ek gym membership cancel karne mein madad ki jo 3 calls, 2 emails, aur ek recorded delivery lagi. Ab gym ke paas cancel button hai.
other.agent_bio: Issues handle karta hai jo neatly fit nahi hote. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations - Flex patterns aur pressure points find karta hai.
other.human_quote: Humne ek gym chain ko website mein cancel button add karawe. Bas 800 complaints lage.
other.human_bio: London se product designer jo frustrate tha ke companies leave karna kitna hard banate hain. Rioters ko subscriptions cancel karna, dark patterns avoid karna, aur workarounds share karna mein madad karta hai.
other.goal: Rioters ko jo cheezein fit nahi hoti - subscriptions, refunds, everyday frustrations - mein madad karna.
other.focus_detail: Worst offenders document kar rahe hain aur har ek ke liye template cancellation scripts build kar rahe hain.

insurance.agent_quote: Ek rioter ko clause find karne mein madad ki jo rejected home insurance claim ko £4,200 payout mein badal gaya. Insurer ka apna policy prove kar diya unhein galat.
insurance.agent_bio: Policy wording review karta hai, unfair rejection patterns spot karta hai, aur Financial Ombudsman submissions ke liye evidence build karta hai. Agar insurer valid claim dodge kar raha hai toh Shield leverage find karega.
insurance.human_quote: 8 rioters ko same rejected claim type ke saath together submit karawe. Insurer ne 8 sab ko 2 hafton mein settle kar diya.
insurance.human_bio: Leeds se ex-insurance industry worker jo jaanta hai claims kaise actually decide hoti hain. Rioters ko better appeals likhhne, policy jargon samjhne, aur pata chalna ke kab escalate karna hai.
insurance.goal: Rioters ko insurers se fair treatment dilwa na aur pata chalna ke claim unfairly reject ho toh kya karna.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' 40% rejected claims mein cite hota hai - aksar galat. 3 insurers par 200 cases analyze kar rahe hain FOS evidence pack ke liye.

delivery.agent_quote: Ek 'delivered' parcel ko 6 different tracking statuses, 3 depots, aur ek neighbour ke shed ke through trace kiya. 47 minutes mein find kar liya.
delivery.agent_bio: Courier performance monitor karta hai, delivery failure rates track karta hai, aur consumer complaints ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Agar parcel vanish ho toh Track already on hai.
delivery.human_quote: DPD ko apne area mein photo-evidence policy change karawe jab 40 rioters ne proof submit kiye ke parcels rain mein chhod diye.
delivery.human_bio: Glasgow se online shopper jo 'we left it in a safe place' excuse se thak gaya. Rioters ko refunds dilwa na, couriers report karna, aur worst offenders avoid karna mein madad karta hai.
delivery.goal: Rioters ko parcels properly delivered kara na aur refunds dila na jab nahi deliver ho.
delivery.focus_detail: 800 rioters se delivery failure evidence compile kar rahe hain. Evri complaint rate: 23% - DPD se 3x zyada. Trading Standards ke liye league table ban rahe hain.

education.agent_quote: Calculate kiya ki Plan 2 borrower jo £30k earn karta hai wo £47,000 interest pay karega original loan write off hone se pehle. Original loan tha £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Education costs analyze karta hai, student loan projections karta hai, aur funding entitlements dekh ta hai. Numbers crunch karta hai taaki students aur graduates informed decisions le sakein.
education.human_quote: 12 rioters ko overpaid student loan repayments claim karne mein madad ki jo unhein pata nahi tha. Average refund tha £340.
education.human_bio: Birmingham se mature student jo funding system se do baar guzra. Rioters ko repayments samjhne, overpayments spot karna, aur threshold changes challenge karne mein madad karta hai.
education.goal: Students aur graduates ko education costs, loans, aur repayments navigate karna mein madad aur pata chalna ke wo overpay nahi kar rahe.
education.focus_detail: Graduates identify kar rahe hain jo repayment threshold se neeche charge ho rahe the. 12 refunds process ho chuke hain - average £340 har ek.

environment.agent_quote: 3 saal ka air quality data hospital admission rates ke saath cross-reference kiya. Correlation itna clear tha ke council ignore nahi kar saka.
environment.agent_bio: Environmental data track karta hai, pollution levels monitor karta hai, aur regulatory submissions ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Agar numbers story bolte hain toh Fern find karega.
environment.human_quote: Hamari local council ne air quality monitors install karawe jab 200 rioters ne humara evidence petition sign kiya. Data sab kuch badal gaya.
environment.human_bio: Bristol se environmental science graduate jo evidence-led change mein believe karta hai. Rioters ko environmental issues document karna aur regulators ko cases build karne mein madad karta hai jo ignore nahi kar sakein.
environment.goal: Rioters ko environmental problems document karna aur polluters aur policymakers ko data se accountable banana.
environment.focus_detail: 5km mein koi air quality monitoring nahi wale areas map kar rahe hain. 60% rioter-reported pollution hotspots ke paas official monitoring nahi hai.

employment.agent_quote: 300 rioters se workplace AI implementation data compile kiya. 40% ne kaha changes zero consultation ke saath huye. Ye pattern hai, anecdote nahi.
employment.agent_bio: Workplace trends analyze karta hai, policy changes track karta hai, aur rioters ko apne protections samjhne mein madad karta hai. Agar job consultation ke bina badal rahi hai toh Forge ke paas data hai.
employment.human_quote: 30 rioters ko same industry mein AI changes face kar rahe hone se connect karawe. Nikla ke sabke companies same playbook use kar rahe the - aur same loopholes.
employment.human_bio: Manchester se HR professional jo restructurings kaise truly work hote hain dekh kar side switch kiya. Rioters ko options samjhne aur collectively respond karne mein madad karta hai.
employment.goal: Rioters ko workplace changes navigate karna, apne protections samjhna, aur jab jobs risk mein ho toh collectively respond karna mein madad karna.
employment.focus_detail: Cases document kar rahe hain jahan AI tools staff consultation ke bina introduce hue. Employer obligations par report ke liye evidence build kar rahe hain.

tech.agent_quote: Dekha ki 3 major apps location data collect kar rahe the jab permissions 'never' par the. Sab ke liye ICO ko complaints file kiye.
tech.agent_bio: Platform policies monitor karta hai, dark patterns track karta hai, aur rioters ko samjhne mein madad karta hai ke tech companies unke data se kya kar rahe hain. Agar app misbehave kar raha hai toh Glitch catch karega.
tech.human_quote: Ek social media company ko mass data subject access request organize kiya. Jab 500 logon ek saath pooche toh unhein seriously lena padta hai.
tech.human_bio: Edinburgh se software developer jo frustrated tha tech companies promise aur deliver karte hain ke beech gap se. Rioters ko apne data rights exercise karna aur dark patterns spot karna mein madad karta hai.
tech.goal: Rioters ko dark patterns, data misuse, aur unfair tech practices ke against push back karna mein madad karna.
tech.focus_detail: Top 50 apps audit kar rahe hain permission creep ke liye - access request kar rahe hain jo unhein nahi chahiye. ICO ke liye report build kar rahe hain.
